summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Fruitee social media campaign platform business flow pages. All 10 business flow pages tested successfully with proper UI components, navigation, and functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts 'Continue to Dashboard' button click at bottom-right of page
integration_issues.workaround: Use sidebar navigation to Dashboard instead

passed_tests: Business Profile page: Logo upload, Business Details (Name, Industry, Website, Team Size, Location, Phone, Description), Social Media Handles (Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, LinkedIn), Cancel + Save & Continue buttons

Business Preferences page: All 8 numbered sections (1. AI Usage & Legal Consent, 2. Categories, 3. Restricted/Excluded, 4. Preferred Content Tone, 5. Primary Content Pillars, 6. Audience Type, 7. Participation Control, 9. Campaign Matching Understanding), Cancel + Save & Continue buttons
Brands page: Add brand input + list functionality, Cancel + Save & Continue buttons
Brand Setup page: Brand Website URL, Brand Logo upload, Product Images (0/3), Brand Colours picker with hex + Add button, Cancel + Save & Continue buttons
Campaign Type page: 4 campaign type cards with radio buttons, EXPANDABLE fields (Campaign Website, Campaign Image(s), Campaign Details) when type selected, Cancel + Continue buttons

Campaign Plan page: Target Market (Territory, Market Size Value, Market Size Customers in 3 cols), Target Customer Profile (Age, Gender, Interests, Income, Lifestyle), Competitors section with Add button, Growth Targets, Cancel + Save & Continue buttons

Influencer Selection page: Horizontal filter bar (Campaign Length, Budget Range, Min Followers, Min Engagement, Search), 3 influencer cards with heart button + stats, Cancel + Select & Continue buttons
Payment page: 3 pricing plans (Starter $29, Pro $79 Most Popular, Enterprise $199) with plan icons, Secure Payment form (Card Number, Expiry, CVC), Pay & Continue button
Content Plan page: Calendar with 11 content items, month navigation, Back + Generate All Content + Continue to Dashboard buttons
Dashboard page: 4 stats cards, Period and Campaign filters, 4 Recharts (Area, Line, Pie, Bar)

Business Settings page: Email display, Change Password, Quick Links (Edit Profile, Manage Brands, Edit Preferences), Campaign Payments with invoices table, Disable/Delete Account buttons, Logout button
Settings gear icon visible on every page at top right
Sidebar navigation visible on all business pages with correct active states
Complete navigation flow: Profile -> Preferences -> Brands -> Brand Setup -> Campaign Type -> Campaign Plan -> Influencers -> Payment -> Content Plan -> Dashboard
seed_data_creation: None - all data is MOCKED in local state
context_for_next_testing_agent: All business flow pages tested and working correctly. The Emergent badge overlay at bottom-right can interfere with buttons in that area - use force=True or sidebar navigation as workaround. All data is mocked - no backend integration.
mocked_api_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - No backend integration. Form data is stored in local React state only and does not persist.
